meta.note: Genuine customer reviews. City is intentionally left blank where not provided by the customer — do not invent a city; main.js hides the city line gracefully when empty.
meta.howToEdit: Each entry needs: name, city (optional — leave "" if unknown), rating (1-5), text, product (optional — matches a product slug from products.json to show 'Verified order: <product name>').

reviews.name: Mrs. U.
reviews.text: I first tried this achar around 14 years ago, and I'm happy to say it still has the same authentic taste today. Absolutely loved it. Thank you, seller!

reviews.name: Zainab S.
reviews.text: Behtareen! MashaAllah, the taste and quality are excellent. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Shahzaib K.
reviews.text: I love trying achar from different sellers across Pakistan, and I had heard a lot about Shikarpuri Achar. Finally decided to order, and it truly lived up to its reputation. The taste is authentic, the service is polite, and the delivery was on time.

reviews.name: Nadia A.
reviews.text: Maza aa gaya! Bilkul wahi traditional taste jo bachpan mein khaya karte the. Definitely ordering again.

reviews.name: Customer
reviews.text: Nice, fresh, and very tasty. Really enjoyed the authentic homemade flavour.
